name: Rushil Decor Limited
summary: Rushil D√É¬©cor Limited manufactures and sells decorative laminates for use in residential, commercial, and institutional spaces in India. The company offers laminate sheets, medium density fibre boards, pre-laminated medium density fibre boards, and polyvinyl chloride boards under the Vir Laminates, Vir PVC, Signor, Vir MDF, Vir prelam, and Vir HDFWR brands. The company also exports its products internationally. Rushil D√É¬©cor Limited was founded in 1993 and is based in Ahmedabad, India.
